about.label: About WPA
about.title: A new standard in protocol education.
about.lead: World Protocol Academy is conceived as a premium hybrid of academy, certification center, AI-supported learning platform, publishing center, and institutional advisory model.

cert_faq.label: Certificates and recognition
cert_faq.title: Certification, verification, and institutional clarity
cert_faq.lead: WPA certificates are professional certificates issued by an independent academy and professional platform.

items.question: Are WPA programmes undergraduate, postgraduate, or doctoral studies?
items.answer: No. WPA programmes are not university study cycles and are not presented as bachelor, master, or doctorate degrees.

items.question: Then what do WPA programmes represent?
items.answer: WPA programmes represent professional certificate programmes with clear structure, levels, learning outcomes, assessment logic, practical application, and verification.

ai.label: AI protocol assistant
ai.title: Virtual Sande — mentor, coach, and protocol adviser.
ai.lead: The AI layer of WPA is designed to support learning, review, protocol scenarios, and self-assessment.

footer.brand_text: Independent digital academy and professional platform for protocol, diplomacy, institutional communication, Professional English, certification, WPA Card, passive revenue, and WPAWS.
footer.disclaimer: WPA provides structured professional non-degree education, certification pathways, and institutional training.
